sections.paragraph:
διωγμίτης, ου, ὁ (s. three next entries; OGI 511, 10, also editor’s note 3 w. further exx.) one who engages in pursuit, detective, (mounted) security officer (cp. Old Eng. ‘manhunter’) MPol 7:1 (JMarquardt, Röm. Staatsverw. I2 1881, 213).—DELG s.v. διώκω.

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

exx. exx. = examples

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

MPol MPol = Martyrdom of Polycarp; after II a.d.—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 253
